headline: Mastercard Deepens Blockchain And AI Push As Shares Face Recent Weakness
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) has launched a large blockchain payments initiative with 85 partners, including Ripple and the Solana Foundation. The company is working with crypto and payments firms to pilot real world blockchain based payment use cases. Mastercard has also introduced AI powered virtual CFO tools aimed at helping small businesses manage finances. Mastercard enters these new initiatives with a current share price of $498.93 and a mixed recent return profile. The stock shows a 3 year...
